characters.name: Aquamaria
characters.description: Meta-Breed Aquamaria is shown to be power-hungry and hateful toward civilians in Dakota and therefore used her powers for criminal reasons. She also has a short temper, shown in "Wet and Wild" when Hotstreak sabotaged the experiment that could cure her, causing her to seek revenge on all of Dakota, and like most rogue meta-humans, she had an intense dislike for Static. But despite her negative traits, Aquamaria does have a sensitive side: she nearly cries when she mentions her family to Static. It is unknown what happens to her after "Wet and Wild", but it is presumed that she returned to her family and was grateful to Static and Gear for helping her.

characters.name: ChainLink
characters.description: ChainLink Brother of Dule, both were exposed to the Big Bang gas, but Chainlink suffered the brunt of the attack. While Dule could hide his powers, Chainlink could not and was forced to show his metal tentacles all the time. In addition to the tentacles, Chainlink was able to absorb metal objects. Jealous of the success and fame of his football career, Chainlink threatened Dule into giving him 90% of all his earnings. After Dule attempted to kill Chainlink, but failed, the two had a finale showdown at the football stadium, where Chainlink was eventually defeated and taken away by the police.

characters.name: Donald Todd
characters.description: Dr. Todd talks to Static and Gear Dr. Todd devised the cure for theBang Babysyndrome, first testing it out onAquamaria. The governor of Dakota eventually allowed Dr. Todd to disperse the Bang Baby cure throughout the city, causing the teens that were afflicted by the gas to turn back to normal. It is revealed that he had no intention of curing Static and Gear; however, he was forced to do it. ThoughEbonand a group of Bang Babies attempted to get the remainingBang Baby gasand create another “Big Bang” to revert everyone to their Bang Baby state, Dr. Todd refused to give them the gas and he was hoping their powers would be gone during the heist; however, Ebon was holding hostages, and he was forced to comply. Later,StaticandGearstopped them and ended up becoming the only Bang Babies left inDakota, alongside a combined terror of Ebon andHotstreak.

characters.name: Ebon
characters.description: Ivan Evans, also known as Ebon, is a cunning and calculated criminal who eagerly confronts any scenario that deviates from his expectations, armed with a masterful ability to manipulate situations to his advantage. Ambitious and driven by a desire for power, he embodies an enigmatic and merciless aura that allows him to effortlessly navigate the shadows he favors over the light, showcasing a relentless and aggressive nature that defines his every move. Ebon was a juvenile delinquent even before his transformation by the Big Bang. He was ruthless and a control freak thanks to his position as leader of his own gang, the Meta-Breed. He was also persuasive, as he managed to convince D-Struct to join his gang, although he was unable to convince Static to join, primarily because of Static's own upbringing and deep-seated dislike of criminal gangs. At times, Ebon displayed a high level of cunning, kidnapping Richie Foley in order to get to Static, then later kidnapping Virgil Hawkins to force him to expose his secret identity. He was also not above impersonating his own brother, Rubberband Man, in order to persuade him to join his gang. When Madelyn Spaulding assumed control of the Meta-Breed after helping them escape from prison, Ebon willingly, yet begrudgingly, allowed her to take command of his gang in a rare moment of humility, though he questioned her leadership skills at every opportunity. He also showed a great deal of affection for Talon, though in reality, he loved her for what she had become rather than who she used to be.

characters.name: Ferret
characters.description:
Ferretwas a former member of theRuffpackand later theMeta-Breed.  After theBig Bang, Ferret's nose grew and he begot an acute sense of smell. He joined theRuffpack, but was beaten by Static.Hyde, the Ruffpack's leader, got tired of being captured by Static, and used Ferret to trace Static's residue — ionized oxygen. They followed the scent to a penthouse party, but after a short fight, Ferret was arrested by the police. Kangor busted him out and they continued on their quest for Static, but the team was ultimately defeated.    
Ferret left the Ruffpack, and went on to fend for himself. Ravaging a park market, he was chased by Static and would have been caught if it wasn't for the Joker. Ferret kindly rejected the invitation to join the Joker's new Bang Baby gang. Joker gassed him for that. He was left as bait for Batman, who indeed showed up and gave Ferret a cure.

characters.name: Harley Quinn
characters.description: "Did I say laughter? I meant penicillin!" Dr. Harleen Frances Quinzel M.D.akaHarley Quinnis the pseudo girlfriend and sidekick of the Joker. She also teams up withPoison Ivyand was the main antagonist of the episodeHard as Nailsnext to Poison Ivy. Harleen Quinzel was an intern at Arkham training to be a psychologist. She chose the ultimate patient to work with, The Joker. She began to believe he loved her and felt compelled to break him out of Arkham Asylum several times before her superior, Joan Lelland busted her and revoked her license. She went insane and doned a harlequin (based on her name) costume.

characters.name: Hotstreak (DCAU)
characters.description: Francis has a horrible temper. Even with mandated anger management therapy, he remains hot-headed and destructive throughout the series. It seems that his temper drives most of his criminal actions, though he admits that he genuinely likes to blow stuff up. Despite his evidently cantankerous traits, Francis is capable of cooperating with others (provided they share his goals and his well-being isn't in jeopardy). This is seen in his interactions with the Joker, Meta Breed, Meta Men and even Static. He's also shown to have a somewhat caring side. InShe-Back!, when he accidentally hits Talon, he grows concerned and goes over to help her up. Likewise, inNo Man's an Island, he asks if Static's "stupid leg" was okay and, despite running off when they were attacked, he returns with Alva, getting the soldiers to stand down. Francis is also revealed to have some hidden depths. In Episode 45, he admits he once spent two years in a hospital. As a result, he has a deep fear of them. He's also shown to be a Lil'Romeo fanboy, asking for his autograph inEpisode 34.

characters.name: Kangor
characters.description: Kangorwas aBang Baby. Kangor was a member of the Ruffpack, along withHydeandFerret. While their plan of using Ferret's sense of smell to trackStaticworked, their other plan — taking him down — didn't. Kangor was defeated by Shaquille O'Neal. When the Joker came to town, Kangor thought it wise to join his newly formed gang. He tried to talk his old gang-friend Ferret into joining, but he politely declined. Without Ferret, the crew robbed the Dakota National Bank. It wasn't long before Batman came to Dakota; Kangor helped ambush them. When Static freed Batman and Robin, Kangor was eager to take on the Bat again, but proved no match. Later, Kangor joined the Meta-Breed, serving underEbon. They had planned to captureRichie Foley, but Kangor was one of the first to be taken down by the new hero, Gear. Kangor was one of the first Bang Babies to be affected by Dr. Todd's cure, which had been sprayed in the air. While robbing a store with Ferret, he weakened and woke up in the hospital, with normal feet again.

characters.name: Leech
characters.description: Leech absorbing Talon's powers  Leech is able to do just what his name implies — leech the powers from anyBang Babyand keep them as his own. Unfortunately, after a while the powers wear out, and Leech requires the host to be “sucked” dry again.

characters.name: Leech

characters.name: Madelyn Spaulding
characters.description: Madelyn SpauldingSpeciesMetahumanHairBlackEyesBlackBaseDakotaAbilitiesTelepathy, Mind controlPost-treatment: Telekinesis, flight Post-treatment: Telekinesis, flight Madelyn is somewhat of an entitled control freak who expects things to go her way. Despite being a go-getter in things she is involved in, she cannot stand most forms of competition and believes she is the obvious winner/most popular for everything. When faced with the reality that she is not the first/only choice for people to pick, she becomes incredibly competitive and jealous. When she gets her powers for the first time, Madelyn used her powers to enslave the student body to worship her and nearly forced them to pick her as the class president. Through the power, she discovered Static's identity and nearly exposed him until she was stopped.

characters.name: Mirage
characters.description: Mirage  Mirage is the sister ofBoom. She helps him in his money making schemes only to help their grandmother. She realizes her mistakes and stops him by helpingStatic. After, Static asks her to make an illusion of him to get his sister, Sharon off his back.
